overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing third-person vehicle driving through a futuristic dystopian city. The journey traverses multi-level highways beneath overpasses, passes a massive mega-building, travels through a tunnel, and ends at a gas station in a gritty urban area with billboards and graffiti.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the highway following traffic beneath overpasses

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating partial cover overhead
complex network of industrial pipes and scaffolding along the left side
green highway sign indicating Barranca direction
green highway sign indicating El Camino Real direction

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath a maze of highway overpasses in an industrial district. The road is flanked by industrial pipe structures on the left and overhead concrete spans create alternating patterns of shadow and sunlight. Green highway signs for Barranca and El Camino Real are visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approaching massive corporate tower

events.description: exits covered highway section into open air with massive tower dominating the skyline

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the curved highway approaching the mega-building complex

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with geometric architecture and glass facade dominating the horizon
overhead highway sign indicating directions to Santo Domingo
concrete barrier wall along the right side of the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up to reveal a massive futuristic mega-tower dominating the skyline. The camera curves right along the elevated road, passing the Santo Domingo highway sign. The industrial structures fall behind as the road barrier wall guides the curve around the massive building complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete tunnel with industrial lighting

events.description: enters dark tunnel with artificial overhead lighting strips

agents.ego_description: driving through the enclosed tunnel maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: smooth concrete tunnel walls with geometric support beams
rectangular overhead LED light panels illuminating the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark enclosed tunnel with smooth concrete walls and geometric support structures. Artificial overhead lighting replaces natural sunlight as the camera drives straight through the underpass, leaving the mega-building and highway structures behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban surface street with gas station and commercial billboards

events.description: exits tunnel into gritty urban street with pedestrians and commercial billboards
slows down and pulls into the gas station stopping at fuel pumps

agents.ego_description: navigating through urban streets, turning left at intersection and pulling into the gas station

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near the gas station entrance

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with face advertisement and PACHINKO text
street sign indicating San Joaquin at the intersection
green and yellow fuel station canopy with FUEL signage
tall digital sign displaying fuel prices in red LED
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
piles of garbage bags and debris along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a gritty urban neighborhood with scattered pedestrians and commercial billboards. The vehicle passes a large PACHINKO billboard and turns at the San Joaquin intersection. Driving past graffiti-covered walls and trash piles, the camera slows and pulls into a gas station, stopping at the fuel pumps beneath the green canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a dystopian city, transitioning from a shadowed industrial highway into a gritty urban neighborhood. It begins beneath a maze of concrete overpasses and industrial pipes, where alternating patterns of light and shadow flicker across the road past signs for Barranca and El Camino Real. As the highway opens up, the camera curves right along an elevated road, leaving the industrial structures behind to reveal a massive futuristic mega-tower dominating the skyline. The scene then shifts abruptly as the vehicle enters a dark, enclosed tunnel with geometric supports and artificial lighting, before emerging back into the daylight of a cluttered city district. Finally, the camera passes a large PACHINKO billboard and graffiti-covered walls at the San Joaquin intersection, slowing down to pull into a gas station beneath a green canopy.
